creator: deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
text:
Please upgrade the nedit port.  Modifications to the port
        are included below.

        Nedit version 5 includes customizable syntax highlighting with
        predefined definitions for C, C++, Java, Javascript, Ada, Fortran,
        Pascal, Yacc, Perl, Python, Tcl, Awk, Csh, Makefile, HTML, Latex,
        VHDL, Verilog, and NEdit Macro languages.

Fix: Apply this diff to the nedit port.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
